title: 有馬記念の後に・羨望と

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Damn it!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I lost to Tamamo...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Whooooa! Tamamo Cross is so fast!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I knew Tamamo Cross was strong! Her talent just
exploded in this race!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
City did great too! Have you ever seen such a
stunning runner?! I hope she'll give us more eye
candy on the track next year!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So Tamamo gets all the normal praise, huh...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Must be nice... I'm jealous.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I was strong too, wasn't I? I've earned my share of
legitimate results, haven't I?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Haha... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Why did I even bother?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's all been a big waste of time.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: City...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey! What's da big idea?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Weren't ya listenin' when I said don't half-ass it
out dere?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I didn't. Or what, did you see me trying to lose?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Dat's not what I mean and ya know it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Tch... Fine! Be a little crybaby, then!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And here I thought ya wanted to show everyone
ya got backbone!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hmph... Guess I'll ask ya one more time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What're ya racing for?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Why do ya run?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Don't look down! Look me in da eyes!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Unreal. Don't tell me I got my hopes up for dis...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I thought you were better than dat.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Why couldn't I say anything?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh well... who cares? Not like any of it even
matters.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Trainer. I'm done.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: There's no point to running anymore.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
People will always look at me the same, no matter
how well I do.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I thought things would change if I showed them
my ability. That's why I worked so hard.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But it was all just wishful thinking.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
People only care about "Pretty City." My running
means nothing to them.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
All my effort until now has been pointless. And it
will keep being pointless.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So I... just don't care anymore.

Gold City looks defeated. Maybe having her
compete in the Arima Kinen was a bad idea.

But there's one thing I need to confirm before I
let regret take over.

She doesn't say anything. But that silence is all I
need to hear.
choice_data_list: (There's no way City wants to quit!)

text_block_list.text:
She's just not at her best right now. All I can do is
continue preparing her for the road ahead.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm getting changed. Leave, please.
choice_data_list: Before that, let's decide your next race.
Before that, let's decide your next race.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Didn't I just say there's no point to running
anymore?
choice_data_list: Let's aim for the Senior Spring Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You're not listening.
choice_data_list: Let's keep showing off your skill!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, fine... Knock yourself out. Not like you need
me there for the sign-up process.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If you want to make me run so bad, then go
ahead.
choice_data_list: Okay, let's start with the Osaka Hai!
Okay, let's start with the Osaka Hai!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You're actually doing this?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Whatever... just get out so I can get changed.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I said get out!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What gives? Didn't I say there's no point?
